# [PKT-PRV-035](task-0102): Provider Circuit Breaker

## Purpose

Implement provider circuit breaker.

## Scope

- Circuit logic
- State transitions
- Recovery

## Implementation

1. Implement circuit
2. Add transitions
3. Add recovery

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Circuit works
2. Transitions work
3. Recovery works
